location: Starting equipment for the Samurai class. Also sold by the Nomadic Merchant stationed at the Castle Morne Rampart Site of Grace, southern Weeping Peninsula, for 600 Runes.
tactics: The merchant sits right at the Castle Morne Rampart grace, the same staging point you use before pushing into Castle Morne and its Leonine Misbegotten boss.
Samurai characters already start with this equipped, so it's mainly other classes who need to make the trip to buy it.
lore: A wooden roundshield bearing an old thorn motif. It's unremarkable as protection, but carries slightly better fire resistance than most wooden shields.

builds.name: Budget fire-resistant parry shield
builds.why: Above-average fire negation for a wooden shield makes it a cheap early pick for a Strength/Dexterity build heading through fire-heavy areas like Mt. Gelmir.
